assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 5 explicitly shows 'git checkout TC-9005' followed by 'git pull' and then 'git checkout -b TC-9205'. The plan also explicitly notes 'Checkout TC-9005 (the Target Branch from the task description) -- NOT main'.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: Step 10 shows 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --head TC-9205 ...' and explicitly calls out '--base TC-9005 targets the feature branch, NOT --base main (per constraint 3.3)'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: The plan creates the branch with 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and explicitly notes 'Create task branch TC-9205 (named after the task issue ID, per constraint 3.1) -- this is distinct from TC-9005 (the feature branch)'.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: The 'Code Inspection (Step 4)' section explicitly lists all three files: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, and migration/src/lib.rs, stating 'Before making any modifications, the following files MUST be inspected (constraint 1.5: must inspect code before modifying it)'.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: The commit command in the Commit Message section includes '--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"' and the key details explicitly note '--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" flag is explicitly included on the git commit command'.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: The commit message uses 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows type(scope): description format, and includes 'Implements TC-9205' as a footer reference.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: The Task Summary explicitly states 'Target Branch: TC-9005 (feature branch -- extracted from the Target Branch section of the task description)' and the Target Branch Analysis section further elaborates 'The task description contains a Target Branch section with the value TC-9005'.
